## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Bytebot and growthx.ai for automating repetitive tasks using AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bytebot offers an open-source container-based solution for deploying AI agents that can interact with computer interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [growthx.ai has numerous use cases for automating repetitive tasks, particularly in content marketing and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to explore a proof-of-concept project, starting with cost-reduction tasks before moving to growth-enabling solutions](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential budget for the solution ranges from $500-$1000/month, with higher value for revenue-increasing automations](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Bytebot's Recent Developments

  - [Soft launch led to surge in GitHub stars (2015 to 500+)](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Updates include:](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
      - [Platform builds for Arm64 and AMD](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
      - [Fixing agent loop](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
      - [Container images for easier deployment](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
      - [Workings of an agent system](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

### Bytebot's Vision and Capabilities

  - [Aim: Create a "drop-in digital worker" indistinguishable from a remote worker](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Core container: OS + integrations for remote control](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Agent setup: Core container + Bytebot agent implementation](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Flexibility to tailor for specific use cases (e.g., HIPAA-compliant workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### growthx.ai's Current Workflow and Challenges

  - [Structure: Chief Content Officer → Directors → Editors → Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Many tasks require manual work due to API limitations or absence](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Examples:](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Publishing on client-specific CMS](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Creating infographics and charts](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [Using Placid for asset creation (API limitations for template creation)](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [SEMrush data extraction (API costs vs. manual extraction)](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Potential Use Cases for Bytebot

  - [Browser automation for tasks without API access](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [File system access for downloading and processing data](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Competitor monitoring on platforms like LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Template creation in design tools](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [SEMrush data extraction and processing](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

### Collaboration Strategy

  - [Start with a proof-of-concept focused on cost reduction](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [2-3 month timeline to build and refine agents for specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Minimal integration required initially, using shared credentials for testing](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Regular demos and feedback sessions](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Gradual progression to more complex, growth-enabling tasks](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### Budget Considerations

  - [Current spend on VAs: Approximately $1000-$2000/month](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Potential budget for Bytebot solution: $500-$1000/month](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Higher value placed on automations that enable new capabilities or increase revenue](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to discuss priorities with Marcel and the team](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Carl to send Slack invite for async communication](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Identify highest priority, browser-automation-based task for initial proof-of-concept](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up early next week to check on progress](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Explore open-source Bytebot solution if time permits](https://fathom.video/share/y5Xq1tTySztSvqzY9aCyEqNLGrX96Dv1?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
